title: Assembly Elections LIVE: Clash breaks out between TMC and BJP supporters in Baranagar ahead of West Bengal Assembly polls
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A clash has broken out in Baranagar, West Bengal.
*   The confrontation is between supporters of the Trinamool Congress (TMC) and the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP).
*   The incident occurred ahead of the West Bengal Assembly polls.

title: A true benevolent authoritarian enforces discipline for the greater good: Seeman
content:
Seeman defines an ideal leader as a "true benevolent authoritarian."
*   This leader's role is to enforce discipline.
*   The ultimate goal of this discipline is to achieve the "greater good" for society.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Segments under Vadakara LS seat could see some keen contests
content:
The 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections are the context.
*   Particular attention is drawn to the assembly segments located under the Vadakara Lok Sabha (LS) seat.
*   These specific segments are anticipated to see highly competitive and keen electoral contests.

title: T.N. Assembly election: For second time, Pottalurani residents to boycott polls over fish waste processing units
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Residents of Pottalurani in Tamil Nadu plan to boycott the upcoming Assembly election.
*   Their decision stems from ongoing issues with local fish waste processing units.
*   This marks the second consecutive election where residents are resorting to a boycott over this unresolved issue.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI(M) State Committee stands firmon six seats
content:
The CPI(M) State Committee has declared its position regarding the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly election.
*   The committee is standing firm on its demand to contest six specific assembly seats.
*   This signifies an unwavering and non-negotiable stance on seat allocation for the party.

title: T.N. Assembly election: parties must avoid excessive freebies, focus on development, says ex-Minister Semmalai
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Former Minister Semmalai has urged political parties participating in the T.N. Assembly election.
*   He advises them to avoid offering excessive freebies to voters.
*   Instead, parties should focus their campaigns and promises on development initiatives.

title: Bandi Sanjay inaugurates Jan Aushadi Kendra in Karimnagar
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Bandi Sanjay inaugurated a Jan Aushadi Kendra.
*   This center aims to provide affordable generic medicines.
*   The inauguration event took place in Karimnagar.

title: No blanket exemption for women teachers above 50 from SIR and census: Revenue Department
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Revenue Department has ruled out any automatic exemption for women teachers above 50 years of age.
*   These teachers will still be required to participate in SIR (Special Intensive Review) and census duties.
*   There will be no "blanket exemption" based solely on age and gender for these responsibilities.

title: Union Minister Kiren Rijiju interacts with Bishops and pastors
content:
Union Minister Kiren Rijiju
*   Held an interaction
*   With Bishops and pastors

title: RDG discontinuation fallout: Himachal presents ‘reduced’ budget
content:
Himachal Pradesh has presented a 'reduced' budget.
*   This reduction is attributed to the discontinuation of a funding mechanism known as RDG.
*   The 'reduced' budget signifies the financial fallout or impact on the state due to this discontinuation.
